targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mitarbeiter AS "Employee",
  TO_CHAR(datum::date, 'DD.MM.YYYY') AS "Date",
  ROUND(SUM(dauer)::numeric, 2) AS "total",
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 9 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.75
      WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 6 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.5
      ELSE SUM(dauer)
    END::numeric,
    2
  ) AS "net total"
FROM xl_projecttimes
WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
  AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${empl_type:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${empl_type:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY mitarbeiter, datum::date
ORDER BY datum::date, mitarbeiter

list.label: Empl Type
list.name: empl_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ma_kat FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE ma_kat IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ma_kat

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
